prompt: Write four absurd but coherent sentences in the voice of a confused medieval chronicler who has been hired to document the Q3 results of a modern SaaS company.
response:
"Hark, as this day I did witness the Count of Navigation speaketh to his Court of Directors, and they did not use quill nor parchment, but did tap upon iridescent tablets that Madras gave to him from across the vast waters."

"The सरकारी雨 has delivered growth most plentiful - a seventy and three percent increase in the number of heads served by their mystical software, though it be not clear where these seventy thousand heads abide, nor whether they belong to freehold barons or villeins."

"The treasurer of the realm didst declare that our coffers are not full of gold florins, but of a mysterious 'ARR,' yet this same man could not say whether it be a new form of metallurgy or merely a manner of bookkeeping."

"The count did then proclaim that in the fourth quarter, they would capture the tub mandated by the lords of Salesforce, though such wooden vessels are not, by all reckoning, subject to capture nor release."
